rulings.Case Title: TERESITA POBRE VS. WELLS FARGO HOME MORTGAGE, A BUSINESS ENTITY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 10 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication The Court will treat this motion as a Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings. The motion is granted with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of her new claims based on lack of beneficial interest at the time of the foreclosure. The Court notes that there are no triable issue of fact regarding Defendant's compliance with Notice requirements (re: posting). Plaintiff presents no evidence that the Notice has not been posted. Plaintiff's evidence only address the fact that the Notice posted on the gate/fence surrounding the property has not been seen. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TERESITA POBRE VS. WELLS FARGO HOME MORTGAGE, A BUSINESS ENTITY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication - Joinder
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 10 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT CLEAR RECON CORP MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication - Joinder The Court will treat this motion as a Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings. The motion is granted with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of her new claims based on lack of beneficial interest at the time of the foreclosure. The Court notes that there are no triable issue of fact regarding Defendant's compliance with Notice requirements (re: posting). Plaintiff presents no evidence that the Notice has not been posted. Plaintiff's evidence only address the fact that the Notice posted on the gate/fence surrounding the property has not been seen. Trial date of February 10, 2020 is vacated. The case is re-set to the Case Management calendar. =(501/CFH)
